_readme: Single source of truth for the campaign-explore field mapping. Edit `columns` to add/change fields; `views` defines source tables + join keys. Consumed by schema.generated.ts and build-sql.ts.

columns.name: TP_COUNTRY_DTR
columns.description:
(Touchpoint country) In which country the campaign cost was actually spent?
    The spend data is pulled from the platform APIs. It's not based on the campaign name and available only in some ad platforms.
columns.lookmlSql:
case when type <> 'adn_data' then ${TABLE}.country
     else ${TABLE}.tp_country_dtr end

columns.name: TARGET_COUNTRY_DTR
columns.description:
Which GEO the campaign is targeting? Could be a specific country/ group of countries.
    **For Capterra & NI the target country dtr is the country of actual spend
    Extract from campaign name
    1st position before the 1st - delimiter
columns.lookmlSql:
CASE
      WHEN ${TABLE}.target_country_dtr IS NULL THEN
      (COALESCE(UPPER(${TABLE}.country), CASE WHEN (  UPPER(substr(${TABLE}.campaign, 0, least(position('-', ${TABLE}.campaign, 1), position('_', ${TABLE}.campaign, 1)) - 1 ))  ) like 'US%' THEN 'US'
                ELSE UPPER(substr(${TABLE}.campaign, 0, least(case when position('-', ${TABLE}.campaign, 1) != 0 then position('-', ${TABLE}.campaign, 1) else 999 end,
                case when position('_', ${TABLE}.campaign, 1) != 0 then position('_', ${TABLE}.campaign, 1) else 999 end) - 1 )) END))
      ELSE ${TABLE}.target_country_dtr END

columns.name: LINKEDIN_SPEND_GOAL
columns.description: For LinkedIn Source - Breaking Down The Spend Activities By LinkedIn Categories
columns.lookmlSql:
CASE
              WHEN (${source} ilike '%linkedin%' AND ${campaign} ilike '%event%') THEN 'linkedin_event'
              WHEN (${source} ilike '%linkedin%' AND${campaign} ilike '%brand%') THEN 'linkeidn_brand'
              WHEN (${source} ilike '%linkedin%' AND (${campaign} ilike '%bonus%' OR ${campaign} = 'us_ca-pmo_jobtitle-ent-video-lead-zoominfo' OR ${campaign} = 'us_ca-pmo_jobtitle-ent-image-lead-zoominfo')) THEN 'linkedin_bonus'
              WHEN (${source} ilike '%linkedin%' AND ${campaign} ilike '%partners%') THEN 'linkedin_partners'
              WHEN (${source} ilike '%linkedin%' AND ${campaign} ilike '%recruiting%') THEN 'linkedin_recruiting'
        ELSE 'linkedin_acquisition' END

columns.description: A dynamic day period from the start of the period
columns.lookmlSql: DATE(DATEADD(DAY, FLOOR(TRUNCATE(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, {% date_start date_range %}, ${TABLE}.created_at)/86400,0)  / {% parameter dynamic_period_length %}) * {% parameter dynamic_period_length %}, {% date_start date_range %}))

SOURCE

columns.name: GEO_CAMPAIGN
columns.lookmlSql:
CASE
            WHEN (${campaign} ilike 'caukau_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'uk_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'gb_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'ca_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'au_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'cauk_%') THEN 'Big3'
            WHEN (${campaign} ilike 'us_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'us1_%' OR ${campaign} ilike '%us2_%') THEN 'US'
            WHEN (${campaign} ilike 'mx_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'mx-%') THEN 'MX'
            WHEN (${campaign} ilike 'fr_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'fr-%')  THEN 'FR'
            WHEN (${campaign} ilike 'de_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'de-%')  THEN 'DE'
            WHEN (${campaign} ilike 'br_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'br-%')  THEN 'BR'
            WHEN (${campaign} ilike 'jp_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'jp-%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'kr_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'kr-%') THEN 'Asia Local'
            WHEN (${campaign} ilike 'latam%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'co_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'cl_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'co-%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'cl-%') THEN 'Latin America'
            WHEN (${campaign} ilike 'int1_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'intl1_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'int2_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'intl2_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'it-it-lang_%') THEN 'ROW-tier1'
            WHEN (${campaign} ilike 'int3_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'intl3_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'int4_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'intl4_%') THEN 'ROW-tier2'
            WHEN (${campaign} ilike 'int5_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'intl5_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'int6_%' OR ${campaign} ilike 'intl6_%') THEN 'ROW-tier3'
            ELSE 'Other'
            END

columns.name: GEO_PRODUCT
columns.lookmlSql:
case when ${TABLE}.source='adwordsyoutube' then(
              case when contains(${campaign},'crm') then ('CRM')
                   when contains(${campaign},'dev') then ('DEV')
                   when contains(${campaign},'marketer') then ('Marketing')
                   when contains(${geo_campaign},'US') then ('US')
                   when contains(${geo_campaign},'Big3') then ('Big3')
                  when contains(${geo_campaign},'ROW-tier1') then ('ROW-tier1')
                  when contains(${geo_campaign},'ROW-tier2') then ('ROW-tier2')
                  when contains(${geo_campaign},'ROW-tier3') then ('ROW-tier3')
                  when contains(${geo_campaign},'DE') then ('DE')
                  when contains(${geo_campaign},'Latin America') then ('Latin America')
                  when contains(${geo_campaign},'MX') then ('MX')
                  when contains(${geo_campaign},'FR') then ('FR')
                  when contains(${geo_campaign},'Asia Local') then ('JP')
                  Else 'Other' end
                    )
                  when ${TABLE}.source ='adwordsyoutubemobile' then 'Mobile'
                  else 'Null'
                    end

columns.name: SOURCEGROUPS
columns.lookmlSql:
case

                                          when (${TABLE}.source = 'adwordssearch' OR 'adwordsverticals') then 'AWsearch'
                                          when ${TABLE}.source = 'adwordslocals' then 'AWlocals'
                                          when ${TABLE}.source = 'adwordsyoutube' then 'AWYoutube'
                                          when ${TABLE}.source = 'facebook' then 'Facebook'
                                          when ${TABLE}.source = 'instagram' then 'Instagram'
                                          when (${TABLE}.source = 'capterra' OR ${TABLE}.source = 'getapp' OR ${TABLE}.source = 'softwareadvice') then 'CapterraGroup'
                                          when ${TABLE}.source = 'outbrain' then 'Outbrain'
                                          when ${TABLE}.source = 'bing' then 'Bing'

                                          when (${TABLE}.campaign = 'dbm' OR ${TABLE}.campaign = 'dbm_display' OR ${TABLE}.campaign = 'dbm_native_display') then 'MB-DV360'
                                          when (${TABLE}.campaign = 'trafficpoint' OR ${TABLE}.campaign = 'videti' OR ${TABLE}.campaign = 'natural_intelligence') then 'MB-CmprnSites'
                                          when ${TABLE}.campaign = 'carbonads' then 'MB-Carbonads'

                                          when ${TABLE}.unattributed=1 then 'Unattributed'
                                          when (${TABLE}.source = null Or ${TABLE}.source = '') then 'Untracked'
                                              else
                                              'OtherSources' end

columns.name: GROUPED_CHANNEL_AND_BUSINESS_GOAL
columns.lookmlSql:
case when ${grouped_channel}='Social_ads' and ${business_goal}='performance_marketing' then 'Social_ads_prm'
              when ${grouped_channel}='MB_Pull' and ${business_goal}='performance_marketing' then 'MB_pull_prm'
              when ${grouped_channel}='MB_Push' and ${business_goal}='performance_marketing' then 'MB_push_prm'
              when ${grouped_channel}='YouTube' and ${business_goal}='performance_marketing' then 'YouTube_prm'
              when ${grouped_channel}='SEM' and ${business_goal}='performance_marketing' then 'SEM_prm'
              when ${grouped_channel}='Facebook' and ${business_goal}='performance_marketing' then 'Facebook_prm'
              when ${grouped_channel}='Linkedin' and ${business_goal}='performance_marketing' then 'Linkedin_prm'

              when ${grouped_channel}='YouTube' and (${business_goal}='brand' or ${source}='adwordsyoutubeawrns') then 'YouTube_brand'
              when ${grouped_channel}='Branded_search' then 'Branded_search'
              when ${grouped_channel}='Facebook' and ${business_goal}='brand' then 'Facebook_brand'
              when ${grouped_channel}='Linkedin' and ${business_goal}='brand' then 'Linkedin_brand'
              when ${grouped_channel}='MB_Push' and ${business_goal}='brand' then 'MB_push_brand'

              when ${grouped_channel}='MB' and ${business_goal}='lead_generation' then 'MB_leadgen'
              when ${grouped_channel}='YouTube' and ${business_goal}='lead_generation' then 'YouTube_leadgen'
              when ${grouped_channel}='SEM' and ${business_goal}='lead_generation' then 'SEM_leadgen'
              when ${grouped_channel}='Facebook' and ${business_goal}='lead_generation' then 'Facebook_leadgen'
              when ${grouped_channel}='Linkedin' and ${business_goal}='lead_generation' then 'Linkedin_leadgen'

              when ${grouped_channel}='DSPs_Display' and ${business_goal}='performance_marketing' then 'DSPs_Display_prm'
              when ${grouped_channel}='DSPs_Video' and ${business_goal}='performance_marketing' then 'DSPs_Video_prm'
              when ${grouped_channel}='DSPs_Display' and ${business_goal}='brand' then 'DSPs_Display_brand'
              when ${grouped_channel}='DSPs_Video' and ${business_goal}='brand' then 'DSPs_Video_brand'
          else 'Other Channels' end

columns.name: PAID_VS_NON_PAID
columns.description: Paid, organic (organic search, organic mobile app install, facebookpage,seo), untracked
columns.lookmlSql:
CASE
            WHEN ${source} in ('seo','facebook_pages','facebookpage','virality', 'mobile_app_organic_install', 'mobile_app_possibly_organic_install', 'referral_install_app_install','facebookpage','organic_search') THEN 'Organic'
            WHEN ${source}='unattributed' THEN 'Unattributed'
            WHEN (${source} IS NULL OR ${source} = '') then 'Untracked'
            ELSE 'Paid'
          END

columns.name: IS_PAID_SOURCE

columns.name: IS_PAID_PRM_SOURCE

columns.name: BUNDLE
columns.lookmlSql:
case

                                          when (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%project%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%gantt%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%timeline%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%pm%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%asana%') then 'Project_Management'
                                          when ((${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%comp%' AND ${TABLE}.campaign NOT ilike '%trello%') AND (${TABLE}.ad_group ilike '%asana%' OR ${TABLE}.ad_group ilike '%wrike%' OR ${TABLE}.ad_group ilike '%basecamp%')) then 'Project_Management'

                                          when (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%task%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%to_do_list%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%todolist%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%notes%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%trello%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%checklist%') then 'Task_Management'
                                          when (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%comp%' AND (${TABLE}.ad_group ilike '%todoist%' OR ${TABLE}.ad_group ilike '%wunderlist%' OR ${TABLE}.ad_group ilike '%trello%')) then 'Task_Management'

                                          when (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%Agile%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%scrum%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%productmanagement%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%roadmap%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%kanban%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%developers%'OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%bugtracking%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%jira%'OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%database%') then 'R&D'
                                          when (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%comp%' AND ${TABLE}.ad_group ilike '%jira%') then 'R&D'

                                          when (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%crm%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%customer_management%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%lead_management%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%sales%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%pipeline%') then 'CRM'

                                          when (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%marketing%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%social_media%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%content%') then 'Marketing'

                                          when (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%team%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%communication%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%meetings%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%celbration%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%chat%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%collab%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%slack%') then 'Team & Collaboration'
                                          when (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%comp%' AND ${TABLE}.ad_group ilike '%slack%') then 'Team & Collaboration'

                                                    else
                                                    'OtherBundles' end

columns.name: CUSTOM_CLUSTER
columns.lookmlSql:
CASE

              WHEN ${source} = 'adwordsyoutube' AND ${campaign} ilike '%-marketing%' then 'Marketing'
              WHEN ${source} = 'adwordsyoutube' AND ${campaign} ilike '%verticals%' AND ${ad_group} ilike '%mar-multiads%' then 'Marketing'
              WHEN ${source} = 'adwordssearch' AND ${campaign} ilike '%-social_media%' then 'Marketing'
              WHEN ${source} = 'adwordssearch' AND ${campaign} ilike '%-marketing%' then 'Marketing'
              WHEN ${source} = 'adwordssearch' AND ${campaign} ilike '%-content_marketing%' then 'Marketing'
              WHEN ${source} = 'adwordssearch' AND ${campaign} ilike '%-templates-%' then 'Marketing'

              WHEN ${source} = 'mb' AND ${ad_group} ilike '%marketing%' then 'Marketing'
              WHEN ${source} = 'mb' AND ${ad_group} ilike '%mrktng%' then 'Marketing'
              WHEN ${source} in ('capterra','getapp') AND ${ad_group} ilike '%marketing%' then 'Marketing'
              WHEN ${source} in ('capterra','getapp') AND ${ad_group} ilike '%social%' then 'Marketing'
              WHEN ${source} in ('capterra','getapp') AND ${ad_group} ilike '%content%' then 'Marketing'
              WHEN ${source} = 'facebook' AND ${campaign} ilike '%- marketing%' then 'Marketing'
              WHEN ${source} = 'instagram' AND ${campaign} ilike '%- marketing%' then 'Marketing'
              WHEN ${source} = 'bing' AND ${campaign} ilike '%-social_media%' then 'Marketing'
              WHEN ${source} = 'bing' AND ${campaign} ilike '%-marketing-%' then 'Marketing'
              WHEN ${source} = 'bing' AND ${campaign} ilike '%-content_marketing%' then 'Marketing'
              WHEN ${source} = 'bing' AND ${campaign} ilike '%-marketing_tmp%' then 'Marketing'

              
              WHEN ${source} = 'adwordssearch' AND ${campaign} ilike '%-realestate%' then 'Real-Estate'
              WHEN ${source} in ('capterra','getapp') AND ${ad_group} ilike '%realestate%' then 'Real-Estate'
              WHEN ${source} = 'facebook' AND ${campaign} ilike '%- real%' then 'Real-Estate'
              WHEN ${source} = 'instagram' AND ${campaign} ilike '%- real%' then 'Real-Estate'

              
              WHEN ${source} = 'adwordssearch' AND ${campaign} ilike '%-realestate%' then 'Real-Estate'
              WHEN ${source} = 'facebook' AND ${campaign} ilike '%- construction%' then 'Construction'
              WHEN ${source} = 'instagram' AND ${campaign} ilike '%- construction%' then 'Construction'
              WHEN ${source} in ('capterra','getapp') AND ${ad_group} ilike '%construction%' then 'Construction'
              WHEN ${source} = 'mb' AND ${medium} = 'construction' then 'Construction'
              WHEN ${source} = 'mb' AND ${campaign} ilike '%aec-business%' then 'Construction'

              
              WHEN ${source} = 'adwordssearch' AND ${campaign} ilike '%helpdesk%' then 'IT'
              WHEN ${source} in ('capterra','getapp') AND ${ad_group} ilike '%itproject%' then 'IT'
              WHEN ${source} in ('capterra','getapp') AND ${ad_group} ilike '%itmanagement%' then 'IT'
              WHEN ${source} = 'mb' AND ${medium} = '%helpdeskn%' then 'IT'
              WHEN ${source} = 'mb' AND ${medium} = '%itassetmgmt%' then 'IT'
              
              WHEN ${source} = 'facebook' AND ${campaign} ilike '%- ecommerce%' then 'Ecommerce'
              WHEN ${source} = 'instagram' AND ${campaign} ilike '%- ecommerce%' then 'Ecommerce'

              else 'Other'
            END

columns.name: SMART_SOURCE
columns.lookmlSql:
CASE
            WHEN source = 'facebook' AND device IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(source,'_',device)
            WHEN source = 'mb' AND campaign IS NOT NULL THEN campaign
            ELSE source END

columns.name: CAMPAIGN_OR_ADGROUP
columns.lookmlSql:
CASE
            WHEN campaign = '' OR campaign IS NULL THEN ad_group
            ELSE campaign END

columns.name: AW_CLUSTER_CATEGORIES
columns.lookmlSql:
CASE
          WHEN ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%dsa%' THEN 'DSA'
          WHEN ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%monday_campaigns%' THEN 'Campaigns'
          WHEN ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%agentfactory%' THEN 'Agent_Factory'
          WHEN ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%magic%' THEN 'Magic'
          WHEN (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%project%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%pmo%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%pm_templates%') THEN 'Project'
          WHEN ((${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%crm%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%sale%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%lead%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%customer%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%pipeline%') and ${TABLE}.campaign not ilike '%dsa%') THEN 'CRM'
          WHEN (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%asana%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%trello%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%smartsheet%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%wrike%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%basecamp%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%comp1%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%comp2%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%comp_exp%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%microsoft_teams%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%slack%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%comp_vertical%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%airtable%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%clickup%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%comp_notion%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%microsoft_pm%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%-comp-%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%comp_miro%') THEN 'Competitors'
          WHEN (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%task%' and ${TABLE}.campaign not ilike '%dsa%') THEN 'Task'
          WHEN (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%gantt%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%timeline%') THEN 'Gantt'
          WHEN (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%to-do%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%todo%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%checklist%') or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%to_do%' THEN 'To-Do'
          WHEN ((${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%marketer%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%marketing%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%social%' or ${TABLE}.campaign like '%content%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%design%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%event%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%hootsuite%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%-templates-%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%-templates_v2-%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%-templates_lt-%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%dsa_templates%'  or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%templates_gen%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%digital%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%whiteboard%') and ${TABLE}.campaign not ilike '%dsa%') THEN 'Marketing'
          WHEN (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%jira%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%bugtra%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%agile%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%developer%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%kanban%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%productmanage%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%comp_tech%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%tech%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%product_manage%') THEN 'Tech'
          WHEN (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%-hr-%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%comp_hr%') THEN 'HR'
          WHEN (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%inventory%' or ${TABLE}.campaign like '%order%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%logistic%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%production_gen%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%construction%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%retail%') THEN 'Logistic'
          WHEN ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%brand%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%pso%' THEN 'AW_Brand'
          WHEN ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%calendar%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%schedule%' THEN 'Calendar'
          WHEN ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%service%' THEN 'Service'
          WHEN ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%campaigns%' then 'Campaigns'
          WHEN ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%ai_main%' or ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%ai_others%' THEN 'AI'
          WHEN ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%aiit%' THEN 'AI Agent IT'
          WHEN ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%aihr%' THEN 'AI Agent HR'
          WHEN ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%aiwork_builder%' THEN 'AI Agent Builder'
          WHEN ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%aicomp%' THEN 'AI Agent Comp'
          WHEN ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%vibe%' THEN 'Vibe'
          WHEN ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%all_categories%' THEN 'Canada All'
          ELSE 'General' END

columns.name: CATEGORY
columns.lookmlSql:
case when ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%prm%' THEN split_part (campaign,'-',6)
              else
              RIGHT(ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(${TABLE}.campaign, '-'), 0, 3), '-'), LENGTH(ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(${TABLE}.campaign, '-'), 0, 3), '-')) - LENGTH(ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(${TABLE}.campaign, '-'), 0, 2), '-')) - 1)
              end

columns.name: YOUTUBE_AUDIENCE
columns.description: The first part of the ad group split by '-'

columns.name: FACEBOOK_ADSET
columns.lookmlSql:
CASE
           WHEN  LENGTH(ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(ad_group, '-'), 0, 3), '-')) = LENGTH(ad_group) THEN ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(ad_group, '-'), 0, 1), '-')
           WHEN  LENGTH(ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(ad_group, '-'), 0, 4), '-')) = LENGTH(ad_group) THEN ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(ad_group, '-'), 0, 2), '-')
           WHEN  LENGTH(ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(ad_group, '-'), 0, 5), '-')) = LENGTH(ad_group) THEN ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(ad_group, '-'), 0, 3), '-')
           WHEN  LENGTH(ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(ad_group, '-'), 0, 6), '-')) = LENGTH(ad_group) THEN ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(ad_group, '-'), 0, 4), '-')
           WHEN  LENGTH(ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(ad_group, '-'), 0, 7), '-')) = LENGTH(ad_group) THEN ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(ad_group, '-'), 0, 5), '-')
           WHEN  LENGTH(ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(ad_group, '-'), 0, 8), '-')) = LENGTH(ad_group) THEN ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(ad_group, '-'), 0, 6), '-')
           WHEN  LENGTH(ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(ad_group, '-'), 0, 9), '-')) = LENGTH(ad_group) THEN ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(ad_group, '-'), 0, 7), '-')
           WHEN  LENGTH(ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(ad_group, '-'), 0, 10), '-')) = LENGTH(ad_group) THEN ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_SLICE(STRTOK_TO_ARRAY(ad_group, '-'), 0, 8), '-')
           ELSE ad_group
          END

columns.name: WORK_FROM_HOME

          ((${source} = 'adwordssearch' OR ${source} = 'adwordslocals' ) AND  ( ${campaign} ilike '%s-comp_remote%' OR ${campaign}  ilike '%s-remote%' OR ${campaign} ilike '%s-comp_slack%')) OR
          (${source} = 'adwordsremarketing' AND ${campaign} ilike '%remote%' ) OR
          (${source} ilike 'linkedin%' AND ${campaign}  ilike '%_acq_no-touch-remote%') OR
          ((${source} = 'facebook' OR ${source} = 'instagram' ) AND ( ${ad_group} ilike '%_remote%' OR ${ad_group} ilike '%_WFH%')) OR
          ((${source} = 'adwordsyoutube'  OR ${source} = 'adwordsyoutubemobile') AND ( ${banner} ilike '%workfromhome%' OR  ${banner}  ilike '%ReuniteYourTeam%' OR ${banner}  ilike '%RemoteTeamSWT%'  OR ${campaign}  ilike '%remote%' OR  ${landing_page} ilike '%workremotely%')) OR
          ((${source} = 'mb') AND ${landing_page} ilike '%remote%' ) OR
          ((${source} in ('capterra', 'getapp')) AND ( ${campaign} ilike '%cloudcommunicationplatform%' OR ${campaign} ilike '%unifiedcommunications%' OR ${campaign} ilike '%Internalcommunications%' OR ${campaign} ilike '%remotework%' OR ${campaign} ilike '%teamcommunication%' OR ${campaign} ilike '%customercommunicationsmanagement%'))
          )
          THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

columns.name: LANGUAGE
columns.description: For aggregative metrics, like spend, the language is taken from ADN data, or extracted from the campaign name. For user level data (visits etc), it's based on the user.
columns.lookmlSql:
CASE WHEN ${TABLE}.type = 'adn_data' THEN
                COALESCE((${TABLE}.language),
                CASE WHEN (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%-fr-%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%!_fr-%' ESCAPE '!')  THEN 'fr'
                WHEN (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%-de-%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%!_de-%' ESCAPE '!')  THEN 'de'
                WHEN (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%-it-%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%!_it-%' ESCAPE '!') THEN 'it'
                WHEN (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%-ja-%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%!_ja-%' ESCAPE '!')  THEN 'ja'
                WHEN (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%-ko-%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%!_ko-%' ESCAPE '!') THEN 'ko'
                WHEN (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%-es-%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%!_es-%' ESCAPE '!')  THEN 'es'
                WHEN (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%-ru-%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%!_ru-%' ESCAPE '!') THEN 'ru'
                WHEN (${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%-pt-%' OR ${TABLE}.campaign ilike '%!_pt-%' ESCAPE '!') THEN 'pt'
                ELSE null END)
                ELSE (${TABLE}.language) END

columns.name: COUNTRY
columns.description: For user level data (visits, signups etc), the country represents the country of the person, based on IP. For aggregative metrics (like spned), the coutnry is taken from the data we recievce from the ad network, or from the name of the campaign.
columns.lookmlSql:
CASE WHEN ${TABLE}.type = 'adn_data' THEN
              COALESCE(UPPER(${TABLE}.country),
              CASE WHEN (  UPPER(substr(${TABLE}.campaign, 0, least(position('-', ${TABLE}.campaign, 1), position('_', ${TABLE}.campaign, 1)) - 1 ))  ) like 'US%' THEN 'US'
              ELSE UPPER(substr(${TABLE}.campaign, 0, least(case when position('-', ${TABLE}.campaign, 1) != 0 then position('-', ${TABLE}.campaign, 1) else 999 end, case when position('_', ${TABLE}.campaign, 1) != 0 then position('_', ${TABLE}.campaign, 1) else 999 end) - 1 )) END)
          ELSE UPPER(${TABLE}.country) END

columns.name: COMPANY_SIZE_GROUPS
columns.description: Company size of the account, from enrichment data or from the signup questions (ehatever is higher)
columns.lookmlSql:
CASE WHEN ${company_size}=1 then '1'
              WHEN ${company_size}=0 THEN '0'
              WHEN ${company_size} between 2 and 5 THEN '5'
              WHEN ${company_size} between 6 and 10 THEN '10'
              WHEN ${company_size} between 11 and 25 THEN '25'
              WHEN ${company_size} between 26 and 50 THEN '50'
              WHEN ${company_size} between 51 and 100 THEN '100'
              WHEN ${company_size} between 101 and 500 THEN '500'
              WHEN ${company_size} between 501 and 1000 THEN '1000'
              WHEN ${company_size} between 1001 and 1500 THEN '1500'
              WHEN ${company_size} > 1500 THEN '1500+'
              WHEN ${company_size} is null THEN 'null'
              Else 'Other' End

columns.name: SUB_REGIONS
columns.lookmlSql:
case when ${TABLE}.country in ('AU','NZ') then 'ANZ'
            when ${TABLE}.country in ('IL', 'GR') then 'IL(&GR)'
            when ${TABLE}.country in ('GB', 'IE') then 'UK&I'
            when ${TABLE}.country in ('DE', 'AT','CH') then 'DACH'
            when ${TABLE}.country in ('SE','DK','FO','FI','IS','NO','AX', 'GL') then 'Nordic'
            when ${TABLE}.country in ('BE','NL','LU') then 'Benelux'
            when ${TABLE}.country in ('US','CA') then 'NAM'
            when ${TABLE}.country in ('ID','VN','LA','BN','TH','MM','PH','KH','SG','MY') then 'SEA'
            when ${TABLE}.country in ('JP', 'FR') then ${TABLE}.country
            else 'Others' end

columns.derivedExpr: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TRUNCATE(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, cm.ACCOUNT_CREATED_AT, cm.FIRST_ARR_DATE)/86400, 0) <= {paid_lock} THEN cm.PULSE_ACCOUNT_ID END)

columns.description: Gmail paying accounts within paid lock

columns.description: Non-Gmail paying accounts within paid lock
columns.derivedExpr: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TRUNCATE(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, cm.ACCOUNT_CREATED_AT, cm.FIRST_ARR_DATE)/86400, 0) <= {paid_lock} AND cm.IS_GMAIL = 0 THEN cm.PULSE_ACCOUNT_ID END)

columns.name: _WORK_PAYING_LOCKED
columns.description: Work paying accounts within paid lock
columns.derivedExpr: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TRUNCATE(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, cm.ACCOUNT_CREATED_AT, cm.FIRST_ARR_DATE)/86400, 0) <= {paid_lock} AND cm.USER_GOAL = 'work' THEN cm.PULSE_ACCOUNT_ID END)

columns.name: _NOT_WORK_PAYING_LOCKED
